title: One two-tuple insert gives different results than two single inserts
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE z (id UInt64, data String NOT NULL, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO z (data) VALUES ('sample data 3'), ('sample data 4');
SELECT COUNT() FROM z WHERE created_at > now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
key_bug_features: Two-tuple insert behaves differently than single inserts
